meta.name: HLV Design System
meta.description: Source of truth for Hudson Lab Ventures brand identity. Use across web (CSS), slides (Google Slides), and print (PDF/worksheets).

violet-600.role: Primary identity. Section marks. Quote accents. Cross-track/Alumni.

pop-400.role: Highlights, attention. Step numbers on dark. Arrow squares. Use dark text on this.

navy-800.role: Text color, dark backgrounds, authority anchor.

rules: Colors used sparingly but at full saturation when they appear
Violet and blue must NOT appear adjacent in highlighted text blocks — not enough contrast
On dark backgrounds, navy drops from the A5c signature (it IS the background)
Pop (yellow) always uses dark text, never white

accent.name: Literata
accent.usage: ONLY blockquotes and testimonials. Never in headings, buttons, cards, or UI.

rules: 600 max for headings. Never 700 except possibly hero over photography (unresolved).
Lead sentences: weight 500 + navy color in body text
Barlow Semi Condensed ONLY for labels, tags, and small uppercase text
Literata ONLY for blockquotes. Never elsewhere.
No exceptions. No pills. No rounded corners beyond 2px at any scale.

a5c_bar.usage: Below hero (if hero is dark), above footer. NOT between every section.
a5c_bar.segments: violet:6 blue:5 coral:4 pop:3 green:2 navy:2

section_mark.usage: Beside section headings. Color rotates per section.

arrow_square.icon: right arrow, navy stroke, square linecap
arrow_square.usage: CTA accent. The geometric identity mark. Used consistently on apply buttons and key links.

highlighted_text_blocks.usage: Hero headlines and CTA headlines on DARK backgrounds only
highlighted_text_blocks.colors: Use contrasting pairs. Good: violet → pop → navy. Bad: violet → blue (too close).
highlighted_text_blocks.stagger: Each line offset 0-48px from the one above

quote_accent_marks.format: 2-3 small colored bars, 4px tall, decreasing width

photo_sections.pair: 2:1 grid ratio, 400px tall, 1px gap or hairline
rules: Use warm-white placeholder bg (#f0eee8), not grey

layout_patterns.editorial_grid: Three equal columns with 1px borders. 48px padding per cell.
layout_patterns.split: 1:1 grid with photo one side, text other. Alternating direction.
layout_patterns.ascending_blocks: Three full-color panels, each stepping upward with ghost numbers.
layout_patterns.facilitator_rows: Square photo left (280px), info right, separated by 1px border.
layout_patterns.process_steps: Large ghost number (42px, 12% opacity) left, content right.

page_principles.landing: The quietest page. Almost entirely warm white. One dark moment (CTA). Color by mark and icon only.
page_principles.program: Dark hero with highlighted text. Editorial content on warm white. Ascending tracks on dark.
page_principles.alumni: Quiet typographic hero. Stats bar. Magazine-style profiles. ALL profiles on light backgrounds.
page_principles.admissions: Split hero. Qualities grid. Process steps. Conversion-focused, not salesy.
